theme_and_archetype.archetype: Hybrid: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with Neon/Glassmorphism influences
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Modern, premium, high-tech but grounded medical aesthetic. The dark mode feels like a high-end command center (neon accents, glass cards), while the light mode feels clean, sterile, and trustworthy.

fonts.instructions: Import both fonts via Google Fonts. Apply 'font-outfit' to h1-h6 and 'font-dm-sans' to body, p, span, inputs, etc.

colors.css_variables_setup: All colors MUST be defined as HSL values in :root and .dark to support Tailwind next-gen styling and shadcn primitives. Example: --primary: 154 40% 30%;

layout_and_spacing.general: Use generous padding. Dashboard grids should be tight (gap-4 or gap-6) but internally spacious (p-6).

sidebar.behavior: Fixed on left for md+ screens. Hidden on mobile.
sidebar.items: Modules: Estoque, Agenda, CRM (Pacientes), Financeiro, Administração. Use Lucide icons.
sidebar.footer: User profile with avatar, name, role, and Theme Toggle button.

mobile_nav.behavior: Bottom bar (fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 border-t bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl) containing main icons. Visible only on md:hidden.

glassmorphism.dark_mode_cards: In dark mode, cards should use bg-card/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5. This creates the requested modern neon/dark dashboard feel.
glassmorphism.light_mode_cards: In light mode, use solid bg-card with subtle shadow-sm and border-border.

shadcn_overrides.Card: Override border-radius to rounded-2xl. Apply glassmorphism utility classes in dark mode.
shadcn_overrides.Sidebar_Items: Group hover effects. In dark mode, active item should have a subtle neon green background (bg-primary/10) and bright primary text, with a 2px left border.

components.kpi_cards: Use a bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4). Include a subtle trend line or mini chart.
components.tables: Go cardless or place inside a large rounded-2xl card. Striped or highly separated rows. In dark mode, row hover should be bg-white/5.
components.theme_toggle: Must be prominently placed (e.g., sidebar footer). Include a smooth icon rotation/transition between Sun/Moon.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons/links must have clear hover states. In dark mode, hover on cards should slightly intensify the border color (border-white/10 to border-primary/30).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion (if available) for simple fade-in/slide-up on page load.

avatars.description: Male doctor/admin profile for the sidebar footer.
Female professional profile for CRM/Patients list.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure CSS variables are correctly set up in index.css for both :root and .dark.
Implement the 256px sidebar and mobile bottom navigation properly using Tailwind responsive classes.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use Google Fonts for Outfit (headings) and DM Sans (body).
For the dark mode aesthetic, combine dark backgrounds with `backdrop-blur-xl` and `bg-white/5` for cards to emulate the modern glass/neon dashboard style without overcomplicating.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, navigation items, and interactive elements.
Do not break any existing Shadcn/UI component functionality, just override their classes using Tailwind.
